requirement_topic.en: Market Access Scope — Importer, Korean Labelling, and Product Configuration Control
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入范围——进口商、韩文标签及产品配置控制
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入範圍——進口商、韓文標籤及產品配置控制

summary.en: South Korea market access for BESS is configuration-dependent. Importers should control the certified product configuration, Korean markings and manuals, rated electrical data, battery chemistry, BMS and PCS version, and installation limits. Changes to cells, modules, firmware, enclosure, fire-protection interface, or PCS may require certification update, project re-review, or new customer approval.
summary.zh: 韩国BESS市场准入与产品配置密切相关。进口商应控制认证产品配置、韩文标识和说明书、额定电气数据、电池化学体系、BMS和PCS版本以及安装限制。电芯、模组、固件、外壳、消防接口或PCS的变化可能需要更新认证、重新进行项目审查或取得新的客户批准。
summary.zht: 韓國BESS市場准入與產品配置密切相關。進口商應控制認證產品配置、韓文標識和說明書、額定電氣數據、電池化學體系、BMS和PCS版本以及安裝限制。電芯、模組、韌體、外殼、消防接口或PCS的變化可能需要更新認證、重新進行項目審查或取得新的客戶批准。

standards_or_laws: KC certification scope and marking controls for regulated battery products
Korean importer and project-owner documentation requirements
Configuration-control requirements arising from fire-safety and grid-connection review

summary.en: Chinese domestic approvals and test reports commonly identify a product family, model, cell type, rated capacity, PCS rating, and installation conditions. Those identifiers must be reconciled against the Korean KC certificate, importer documents, fire-safety package, and KEPCO project files.
summary.zh: 中国国内批准和测试报告通常识别产品系列、型号、电芯类型、额定容量、PCS额定值和安装条件。这些标识须与韩国KC证书、进口商文件、消防安全资料包和KEPCO项目文件保持一致。
summary.zht: 中國國內批准和測試報告通常識別產品系列、型號、電芯類型、額定容量、PCS額定值和安裝條件。這些標識須與韓國KC證書、進口商文件、消防安全資料包和KEPCO項目文件保持一致。

gap.en: A common export gap is inconsistent model scope across Chinese test reports, KC evidence, UN 38.3 summaries, Korean manuals, fire-safety drawings, and KEPCO grid documents. Exporters should maintain a controlled compliance matrix by SKU and project, including cell supplier, module design, rack design, BMS version, PCS firmware, enclosure rating, fire interface, and transport configuration.
gap.zh: 常见出口差距是中国测试报告、KC证据、UN 38.3概要、韩文说明书、消防图纸和KEPCO并网文件之间型号范围不一致。出口商应按SKU和项目维护受控合规矩阵，包括电芯供应商、模组设计、电池架设计、BMS版本、PCS固件、外壳等级、消防接口和运输配置。
gap.zht: 常見出口差距是中國測試報告、KC證據、UN 38.3概要、韓文說明書、消防圖紙和KEPCO併網文件之間型號範圍不一致。出口商應按SKU和項目維護受控合規矩陣，包括電芯供應商、模組設計、電池架設計、BMS版本、PCS韌體、外殼等級、消防接口和運輸配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where KC, fire-safety, importer, customs, or KEPCO project documentation requires controlled product identity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on domestic certification, grid, and fire-review scope

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Korea BESS market access as a controlled configuration problem. The KC, fire-safety, transport, and KEPCO records should describe the same product and project configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将韩国BESS市场准入视为受控配置问题。KC、消防安全、运输和KEPCO记录应描述同一产品和项目配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將韓國BESS市場准入視為受控配置問題。KC、消防安全、運輸和KEPCO記錄應描述同一產品和項目配置。
